title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Kuehne+Nagel India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Kuehne+Nagel India
jsonLd.description:
Kuehne+Nagel India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Kuehne+Nagel India:
Kuehne+Nagel India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kuehne+Nagel India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
